safety_note: Public data only. No real funding partner names, private routing logic, affiliate links, apply links, private compensation data, private access details, borrower PII, or private review notes.
description: Public-safe checklist items by funding path and review scenario.
global_guidance: Prepare documents before review. Do not upload unnecessary sensitive documents through public forms unless a secure workflow is provided.

checklists.label: Core Business File
checklists.summary: Baseline documents and details commonly needed for a cleaner funding-readiness conversation.

items.label: Legal business name and DBA if applicable
items.why: Confirms basic business identity.

items.label: Entity type, formation state, and formation date
items.why: Helps review time in business and structure.

items.label: EIN or tax ID details if available
items.why: Supports business identity review.

items.label: Owner contact details
items.why: Needed for follow-up and review coordination.

items.label: Clear funding purpose and target amount
items.why: Routes the conversation toward the right funding family.

checklists.label: Working Capital
checklists.summary: Useful when funds are intended for payroll, inventory, materials, marketing, or short-cycle operating needs.

items.label: Last 3–6 months of business bank statements
items.why: Shows deposits, cash flow, and bank activity patterns.

items.label: Simple monthly revenue summary
items.why: Helps compare the requested amount to current business activity.

items.label: Use-of-funds note
items.why: Clarifies whether the request is for payroll, inventory, materials, or growth.

items.label: List of existing business financing obligations if any
items.why: Helps identify cash-flow pressure and review needs.

checklists.label: Equipment or Asset Funding
checklists.summary: Useful when funding is tied to equipment, vehicles, trucks, machinery, or other business assets.

items.label: Equipment invoice, quote, or purchase estimate
items.why: Defines the asset and target amount.

items.label: Seller or vendor details
items.why: Supports asset review and transaction planning.

items.label: Description of how the asset supports revenue
items.why: Connects the asset to business operations.

items.label: Insurance, registration, or operating documentation if applicable
items.why: May help with asset-heavy scenarios.

checklists.label: E-commerce or Marketplace Seller
checklists.summary: Useful for sellers using marketplaces, carts, or online storefronts.

items.label: Recent platform sales reports or platform disbursement history
items.why: Shows online revenue activity.

items.label: Storefront or marketplace profile links
items.why: Helps verify the business model and channel.

items.label: Inventory or advertising plan
items.why: Clarifies how the requested funds support growth.

items.label: Marketplace status and account standing
items.why: Identifies platform risk without exposing private account data publicly.

checklists.label: Real Estate Project
checklists.summary: Useful for investor, rental, bridge, project, or property-backed scenarios.

items.label: Property address or project summary
items.why: Defines the asset or project.

items.label: Purchase agreement, scope of work, or project estimate
items.why: Shows the funding use case and project size.

items.label: Real estate experience summary
items.why: Helps review project readiness.

items.label: Exit or repayment strategy summary
items.why: Clarifies how the project is expected to resolve.

checklists.label: Startup or Credit-Leverage Path
checklists.summary: Useful when the business has limited operating history and readiness depends more on structure, documents, and personal credit profile.

items.label: One-page business plan or operating summary
items.why: Explains what the business does and how funds would be used.

items.label: Estimated personal credit range
items.why: Often matters more when business history is thin.

items.label: Entity, EIN, bank account, and contact consistency checklist
items.why: Supports clean setup before seeking capital.

items.label: Any early revenue, contracts, purchase orders, or pipeline proof
items.why: Can strengthen a newer business file.

checklists.label: Manual Review Packet
checklists.summary: Useful when a human review is recommended before choosing a next step.

items.label: Scorecard result summary
items.why: Gives the reviewer context.

items.label: Short notes on known blockers or concerns
items.why: Keeps review honest and efficient.

items.label: List of missing documents
items.why: Shows what must be gathered next.

items.label: Desired timing and urgency
items.why: Helps prioritize next-step planning.
